items.final_wording: Supports seizure-control and adverse-effect review, clinician-led medication and interaction review, antiseizure medication levels when indicated, care review, and pregnancy-related specialist review without mapping a dose.

source.title: Epilepsies in children, young people and adults
source.population: Children, young people, and adults with suspected or established epilepsy.
source.setting: Primary, specialist, emergency, and ongoing epilepsy care.
source.exclusions: Exact for epilepsy assessment, monitoring, information, emergency planning, and risk review; international only and local driving, referral, and prescribing rules require UAE review.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports seizure-control and adverse-effect review, clinician-led medication and interaction review, antiseizure medication levels when indicated, care review, and pregnancy-related specialist review without mapping a dose.

items.rationale: Supports seizure-control, adverse-effect, medicine, interaction and monitoring review for epilepsy medication review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports seizure frequency, adherence, alcohol or drug use, uncontrolled seizures, abnormal neurological findings, and clinician-documented risk and safety discussion.

source.title: Epilepsies in children, young people and adults

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 10.1.1–10.2.2 — epilepsy-related death and SUDEP risk

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports seizure frequency, adherence, alcohol or drug use, uncontrolled seizures, abnormal neurological findings, and clinician-documented risk and safety discussion.

items.rationale: Supports adherence, seizure-frequency and safety discussion for epilepsy medication review; no decision is generated.
